title: Fix navigation structure — remove anchor links, fix Audit item, add badge to approval count
acceptance_criteria: The 'Audit' nav item under Governance links to /tasks/:taskId is replaced with either a dedicated /audit route or temporarily removed — it must NOT link to a task page with the label 'Audit'
The 'Views' section at top of nav is removed (it duplicates the Workspace/Coordination/Governance sections below it)
The approval badge count (e.g., '1') appears correctly on the Approvals nav item when pendingApprovals.length > 0
All nav links navigate to their intended routes without 404 errors
completion_summary: Removed duplicated navigation structure, preserved the approvals badge, and ensured Audit no longer pointed at a task route.
